findings.name: analytics-vm-01
findings.waste_reason: Standard_D4s_v3 VM (4 vCPU, 16 GiB) averaging 0.5% CPU and 1.2 GiB memory usage over 90 days. No RDP/SSH sessions logged in Activity Log since April. The VM appears to run a deprecated reporting service.
findings.recommendation: Deallocate the VM and capture a managed image. If the reporting service has been replaced, delete the VM and its managed disks.

findings.name: staging-db
findings.waste_reason: S2 (50 DTU) Azure SQL Database with 0 active sessions and 0.1% DTU utilization over 90 days. No queries logged since late March. The database is likely left over from a completed project.
findings.recommendation: Export the database as a BACPAC to Azure Blob Storage, then delete it. Downgrade to Basic tier ($5/mo) if you need to keep it temporarily accessible.

findings.name: orphaned-data-disk
findings.waste_reason: 256 GiB Premium SSD (P15) managed disk not attached to any VM for 44 days. Zero read/write IOPS recorded.
findings.recommendation: Create a snapshot, then delete the managed disk. If long-term archival is needed, copy the snapshot to Standard storage tier.

findings.name: test-runner-vm
findings.waste_reason: Standard_B2s VM in deallocated state for 52 days. Associated OS disk (30 GiB Standard HDD) continues incurring charges.
findings.recommendation: Delete the VM and its disks. Capture a VM image first if the test environment configuration needs to be preserved.

findings.name: unused-pip
findings.waste_reason: Standard SKU public IP address not associated with any resource. Azure charges ~$0.004/hr for idle Standard public IPs.
findings.recommendation: Delete the public IP address. Update any DNS records or NSG rules that reference it.

executive_summary: Scanned 623 resources across 1 Azure subscription (eastus, westus2). Found 5 idle resources with $445.60/month estimated waste. An underutilized VM and an idle SQL Database account for 81% of total waste. Recommend immediate cleanup of the deallocated test-runner VM and orphaned managed disk.
